CustomField.formula: CASE( Product_Line__c , 'TV','0110', 'BG-Others','0190', 'Laser TV','0150', 'Commercial display','01A0', 'MP','0120', 'Sound Bar','0160', 'Other','0300', 'Medical utltrasound','0401', 'Smart City','0403', 'AC','0200', 'Refrigerator','0202', 'Freezer','0203', 'WM','0204', 'Small Domestic Home Appliances','0205', 'LCAC','2020', 'Hitachi Commercial AC','0207', 'WineCabi','0209', 'Cooking','0210', 'Dishwasher','0211', 'CF','0212', 'HeatPump','0213', '')
CustomField.label: Product Line Code
